name: log_call
description: Records a phone call interaction against a CRM contact, including call outcome, duration, and notes. Optionally schedules a follow-up action with a due date for pipeline continuity.

contact_id.description: The unique identifier of the CRM contact the call was made with.
contact_id.$comment: Links the call log to the contact's activity timeline in the CRM.

duration_minutes.description: The duration of the phone call in minutes.
duration_minutes.$comment: 0 is valid for unanswered calls or immediately disconnected attempts. Duration is estimated and manually entered.

outcome.description: The result or outcome of the phone call attempt.
outcome.$comment: Enum values map to CRM pipeline stages and reporting dashboards. 'positive' typically means a successful conversion step.

notes.description: Detailed notes about the call content, discussion points, and any commitments made.
examples: Discussed pricing. Contact is interested in Enterprise plan. Agreed to send proposal by Friday.
No answer. Will try again Thursday morning.
Left voicemail explaining the product update and requesting a callback.
notes.$comment: Required field — call logs without notes provide no actionable information for future reps or AI pipelines.

next_action.description: Optional description of the follow-up action to take after this call.
examples: Follow up with pricing proposal PDF.
next_action.$comment: Used to populate the CRM's task queue; pair with next_action_date for deadline-driven follow-ups.

next_action_date.description: Optional ISO 8601 date string for when the next action should be completed.
next_action_date.$comment: Date-only (YYYY-MM-DD) rather than datetime to avoid timezone ambiguity in follow-up scheduling.
